message:
Release v1.0.14

Highlights:
- Windows support: Fixed spawn ENOENT errors
- CLI overhaul: Replaced bash scripts with Node.js, uses compiled JS
- Background sync now works correctly
- Agent conversations properly excluded from search index
- Auto-create config directories on first run

See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
